title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at IIFL Finance International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at IIFL Finance International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, IIFL Finance International Enterprises in Agra is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About IIFL Finance International Enterprises:
IIFL Finance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIFL Finance International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
